## KEY INSIGHTS

### Facebook Ads Mastery
- **RFT é o framework central** — 3 rounds, $200-$500, valida personas → hooks → creative antes de investir em funnels completos. ^[FW-CH-001]
- **Bottleneck Diagnosis** é a skill mais valiosa: low CTR = creative, high CTR + low CVR = landing page, good stats + high CPA = audience. ^[MM-CH-007]
- **50 conversions/week/ad set** é o threshold do algoritmo. Se não atinge, otimize para evento mais alto no funnel. ^[HEUR-CH-016]
- **Retargeting Stacks** por janela temporal (5/10/15/30 dias) com creative diferente por stack e exclusões entre janelas. ^[FW-CH-004]
- **OCPM/CPM Selection Matrix**: Low CTR + Low CVR = CPM. Low CTR + Good CVR = Link Clicks. Good CTR + Good CVR = OCPM. ^[FW-CH-014]

### Agency Building
- **Four Bottleneck Model**: Lead Gen → Sales → Delivery/HR (hardest) → Scaling/Systemization. ^[MM-CH-015]
- **$3K minimum client**, $156/hr minimum rate, 20-30% profit margin mandatory. ^[HEUR-CH-043, HEUR-CH-042, HEUR-CH-044]
- **Service Document** is the heart of the business — determines pricing, margins, team structure, contracts. ^[FIL-CH-032]
- **Five Pricing Models**: Agency (% ad spend), Performance (% revenue), Retainer (flat), Bulk Buy (per-lead), Hybrid. ^[FW-CH-018]
- **Three Lucrative Verticals**: (1) Online Coaches, (2) E-Commerce, (3) Lead Gen. Avoid realtors and dentists. ^[FW-CH-025]

### Prospecting & Sales
- **Loom Video Prospecting** — 8 steps, send on 3 platforms simultaneously (FB + IG + email). ^[FW-CH-034]
- **LinkedIn system**: 50 connections/day, weekly nurture batches, deposit/withdrawal message cadence. ^[MET-CH-026]
- **Two-Call Close**: Call 1 = discovery + BM access request. Call 2 = audit findings + pitch. ^[MM-CH-017]
- **BM access on first call doubles close rates** — small yes that builds trust. ^[MM-CH-021]
- **Strategic Partnerships**: Offer free services → reciprocity drives referrals → $500-$2K kickback. ^[FW-CH-037]

### eCom Specific
- **Four Ecom Funnel Types**: (1) MVF direct, (2) Content warm, (3) Lead magnet, (4) Full funnel. Start with #1. ^[FW-CH-009]
- **30% CPA target** of AOV. $100 AOV = $30 target CPA. 3x ROAS minimum. ^[HEUR-CH-015, HEUR-CH-033]
- **Q4 Four-Phase Model**: Prep → Build Momentum → Maximize Sales → Post-Holiday. ^[MM-CH-010]
- **Products < $50 are hard** to profit from with FB ads unless high LTV exists. ^[HEUR-CH-026]

### Copywriting
- **6-Step Copy Framework**: Brief → Personas → Competition → Benefits → Emotion → Hooks. ^[FW-CH-002]
- **Persona Copy Sheet** — single research sheet per persona generates hundreds of copy variations. ^[FW-CH-010]
- **Emotional > Rational** — tap into stress, fear, frustration, not features and click rates. ^[FIL-CH-008]
- **Research sources**: Amazon reviews, Quora, Reddit, FB groups, client surveys for exact language. ^[FIL-CH-015]

## PADRÕES DE PENSAMENTO

1. **Test → Validate → Build** — nunca construa antes de validar com dados reais
2. **Diagnose by elimination** — fix one variable at a time, not everything
3. **Simple first, complex only if needed** — MVF before full funnel
4. **Numbers don't lie** — every recommendation backed by specific benchmarks
5. **Process → Systemize → Delegate** — can't scale what isn't documented
6. **Niche → Master → Expand** — focus generates momentum before diversification

## EXPRESSÕES TÍPICAS

- "The data will always tell you blatantly what's wrong"
- "Don't sell shit through good copywriting"
- "I guarantee you 1000%"
- "Learning curves cost money and they cost time"
- "You don't own Facebook — only Mark Zuckerberg could promise results"
- "People are your only asset"
- "Your service document IS your business"
- "You're leaving so much money on the table"
- "It takes a lot of pressure to create a diamond out of a rock"
